markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.021 — Contested Case Notice

The board shall post in the board office for public inspection a notice that includes the same information as the notice given to the parties in each contested case.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The board shall post in the board office for public inspection a notice that includes the same information as the notice given to the parties in each contested case.
